_comment_top: R6 task 104 (D-H-04, FR-20) — seed row for the FinancialCalculationToolHandler typed handler (pure-deterministic formula handler).
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'FinancialCalculationToolHandler' (= nameof handler class). Source: src/server/api/Sprk.Bff.Api/Services/Ai/Handlers/FinancialCalculationToolHandler.cs
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_toolcode first; UPSERTs to sprk_analysistool entity.
_comment_toolcode: R6 audit item 4 (2026-06-07): sprk_toolcode column extended manually from 10 to 100 chars. Renamed from 'FIN-CALC-FORMULA@v1' to descriptive 'FINANCIAL-CALCULATION'. NO @v1 suffix per cross-environment migration policy.
_comment_envelope: R6 audit item 4 (2026-06-08) Finding C: file restructured from nested {row:{...}} envelope to flat shape so Get-PayloadFromRowJson in Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1 (which iterates top-level properties) emits the correct sprk_* payload. Previous _task / _handlerSource / _dataverseEntity / deployment keys folded into _comment_* prose above (script skips any key starting with _comment).
_comment_adr_compliance: ADR-010: auto-discovery picks up handler — NO manual DI line. ADR-013: handler in Services/Ai/Handlers/; CRUD-side code routes through PublicContracts facades (not relevant for this deterministic handler). ADR-015: telemetry surface is handler name + formula name + outcome + duration + IDs ONLY; never input values. ADR-029: zero new NuGet packages; BFF publish-size delta << 0.5 MB.
sprk_description: Pure-deterministic, currency-aware financial formulas: simple/compound interest, present/future value, loan payment (amortization), ROI. All monetary math uses decimal. No LLM call.
_comment_dropped_fields: R6 audit item 4 (2026-06-08) Finding C: original nested envelope had sprk_tooltype:7, sprk_ownertype:'SYS', sprk_isimmutable:true. MCP describe(tables/sprk_analysistool) confirms NONE of these are real columns on the entity (real columns: sprk_tooltypeid LOOKUP to sprk_aitooltype; no ownertype/isimmutable fields). Dropped during flattening — they would have been silently rejected by Dataverse Web API anyway. SYS-prefix on sprk_name is the human signal for 'system-owned'.
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000002 = Both (Playbook + Chat) per user direction 2026-06-08 (audit item 4 Finding B override) — consistent with FR-13..FR-20 acceptance that all 8 typed handlers are chat-exposable. Previous default was 100000000 (Playbook-only) pending chat-facing JSON schema; that schema is now provided in sprk_jsonschema below, so Both is appropriate.

sprk_jsonschema.title: FinancialCalculationToolHandler Request
sprk_jsonschema.description: Argument shape for chat-driven invocation of FinancialCalculationToolHandler. Selects a formula and supplies named decimal inputs; the handler returns the computed value rounded per options.

inputs.description: Named decimal parameters. Required keys per formula: simple_interest=[principal,rate,time]; compound_interest=[principal,rate,time]; present_value=[futureValue,rate,time]; future_value=[presentValue,rate,time]; loan_payment=[principal,rate,periods]; roi=[gain,cost].

_comment_configuration: Default config = simple_interest with textbook values ($1000 @ 5% for 2y → $100). Per-invocation playbook nodes / chat tool calls override formula + inputs at runtime via the AnalysisTool.Configuration override; this seed only documents the contract shape.
